Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait across all process variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Total time spent in Accepted + Wait per case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time required to complete Accepted + Wait
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Elapsed time between the start of Accepted + In Progress and the end of Accepted + Wait
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Time from Queued + Awaiting Assignment to the completion of Accepted + Wait
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Wait when followed by Completed + Resolved
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + Resolved occurs

Name: Total time for Accepted + Wait in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Minimum time between Accepted + Wait and Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait in cases where Completed + In Call occurs later in the trace
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Elapsed time from Accepted + Wait to Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Time it takes to perform Accepted + Wait after Accepted + In Progress in variants containing Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Total duration of Accepted + Wait compared to the duration of Accepted + Wait - User within the same variant
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait versus Accepted + Wait - Implementation in traces leading to Completed + Resolved
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + Resolved occurs

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Wait relative to Accepted + Wait - Vendor in high-impact cases
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Time between the end of Accepted + Wait and the start of Completed + In Call in recurring process patterns
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Cycle time of Accepted + Wait when it appears immediately before Completed + Resolved
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Total time for Accepted + Wait in variants that transition directly to Completed + Closed without intermediate waits
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + Closed occurs

Name: Elapsed time from case start to the completion of Accepted + Wait in traces that eventually execute Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Wait in variants with multiple re-entries into Accepted + In Progress before Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Time from the last occurrence of Accepted + In Progress to the end of Accepted + Wait when Completed + In Call follows
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'
